summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLT Synapse Finance & Accounting Module. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly including CFO Dashboard, Journal Entries, Expenses, Transfers, Chart of Accounts, and Submit/Approve workflow.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/accounting/accounts - Returns accounts list
Backend: POST /api/accounting/accounts/seed - Seeds 22 default accounts
Backend: GET /api/accounting/accounts?account_type=Asset - Filter by type works
Backend: GET /api/accounting/dashboard - Returns KPIs, balances, alerts
Backend: Dashboard account_balances section - banks_and_wallets, receivables, totals
Backend: Dashboard KPIs section - today revenue, MTD revenue, provider fees
Backend: GET /api/accounting/journal-entries - Returns entries with pagination
Backend: POST /api/accounting/journal-entries - Creates balanced entry
Backend: POST /api/accounting/journal-entries - Rejects unbalanced entry (400)
Backend: POST /api/accounting/journal-entries/{id}/submit - Submit workflow
Backend: POST /api/accounting/journal-entries/{id}/approve - Approve workflow with lock
Backend: GET /api/accounting/expenses - Returns expenses list
Backend: POST /api/accounting/expenses - Creates expense with journal posting
Backend: GET /api/accounting/transfers - Returns transfers list
Backend: POST /api/accounting/transfers - Creates transfer with journal posting
Backend: GET /api/accounting/settlements - Returns settlement batches
Backend: GET /api/accounting/config - Returns finance configuration
Backend: GET /api/accounting/audit-logs - Returns audit entries
Backend: Accounting endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Dashboard integration - Updates after journal entry creation
Backend: Double-entry validation - Debit equals Credit enforced
Frontend: Finance Dashboard loads with KPI cards (Total Cash, Pending Receivables, Revenue)
Frontend: Where Money Lies section shows live account balances for banks, wallets, cash
Frontend: Provider Receivables section shows Tabby, Tamara, Network receivables
Frontend: Alerts section shows 'No active alerts' when no issues
Frontend: Dashboard tab navigation works (Dashboard, Journal, Settlements, Expenses, Transfers, Accounts)
Frontend: Journal tab displays entries with Date, Description, Source, Debit, Credit, Status, Actions
Frontend: New Entry button opens Create Journal Entry modal
Frontend: Journal modal has Date, Description, Debit Account, Credit Account, Amount fields
Frontend: Journal modal shows Balance indicator (OK/Unbalanced)
Frontend: Submit button changes entry status from Draft to Submitted
Frontend: Approve button changes entry status from Submitted to Approved with lock icon
Frontend: Accounts tab displays Chart of Accounts with Code, Name, Type, Subtype, Currency, Status
Frontend: 22 seeded accounts displayed correctly (Banks, Wallets, Cash, Receivables, Revenue, Expenses, Equity)
Frontend: Expenses tab displays expense records with Date, Vendor, Category, Amount, Paid From, Status
Frontend: Record Expense button opens expense modal with all required fields
Frontend: Expense modal has Expense Category and Paid From dropdowns
Frontend: Transfers tab displays transfer records with Date, From, To, Amount, Status
Frontend: New Transfer button opens transfer modal with all required fields
Frontend: Transfer modal has From Account and To Account dropdowns
Frontend: Settlements tab displays settlement batches table (empty state working)
Frontend: Toast notifications show for Submit and Approve actions
critical_code_review_comments: Double-entry accounting implementation is correct - enforces balanced entries
Journal entry workflow (Draft → Submitted → Approved → Locked) is properly implemented
Automatic journal posting for expenses and transfers works correctly
CFO Dashboard aggregates data from multiple sources (accounts, journal entries, settlements)
Chart of Accounts follows standard accounting structure (Assets, Liabilities, Income, Expense, Equity)
Settlement module ready for Tabby/Tamara integration with provider-specific rules
Finance audit logging captures all accounting operations
seed_data_creation: 22 default accounts seeded via /api/accounting/accounts/seed. Test journal entries, expenses, and transfers created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance & Accounting module fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Double-entry accounting with balanced journal entries. 2) CFO Dashboard with live account balances, KPIs, and alerts. 3) Chart of Accounts with 22 default accounts (Banks, Wallets, Cash, Receivables, Revenue, Expenses, Equity). 4) Journal entry workflow: Draft → Submit → Approve → Lock. 5) Expense recording with automatic journal posting. 6) Inter-account transfers with automatic journal posting. 7) Settlement module for Tabby/Tamara/Network providers. 8) Finance audit logging. All APIs prefixed with /api/accounting/.

features_verified.cfo_dashboard: Working - KPI cards, account balances, alerts section
features_verified.where_money_lies: Working - Shows ADCB Bank (AED 54,750), ADIB Bank (AED 5,000), etc.
features_verified.chart_of_accounts: Working - 22 accounts with correct types and subtypes
features_verified.journal_entries: Working - CRUD, balanced validation, submit/approve workflow
features_verified.expenses: Working - Create expense with automatic journal posting
features_verified.transfers: Working - Create transfer with automatic journal posting
features_verified.settlements: Working - Table displays, ready for settlement batches
features_verified.modals: Working - Journal, Expense, Transfer modals open and function correctly
